name: 5' x 7' Jungle Tropical Outdoor Rug Navy/Coral - Threshold™: Woven Polypropylene & Polyester, Hose Clean
description: Bring a touch of tropical charm to any space outside your home with this Jungle Tropical Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. Featuring a bold tropical print with colorful coral streaks on a solid navy backdrop, this tropical outdoor rug has a detailed print and use of vibrant colors that stand out while making for a functional piece in your outdoor decor. Whether placed on the patio, deck or outside porch, this rectangular area rug suits any outdoor space.
